label: Most recent 30 days of paystubs
body: Provide the borrower's most recent paystubs covering a 30-day period showing YTD earnings, employer name, and borrower name.

label: Two years W-2s
body: Provide W-2 forms for the two most recent tax years for all employment used to qualify.

label: Two months bank statements for reserves
body: Provide two most recent consecutive months of bank statements (all pages) evidencing sufficient reserves. Source any large deposits.

label: Letter of explanation for recent credit inquiries
body: Provide a signed letter of explanation addressing the three credit inquiries in the last 90 days shown on the credit report.

label: Full appraisal report for subject property
body: Provide a completed appraisal report (Form 1004) supporting the value of the subject property at 123 Main St.

label: Homeowners insurance declaration page
body: Provide the homeowners insurance declaration page showing coverage at least equal to the loan amount, valid dates, and the correct mortgagee clause.

label: Government-issued photo ID
body: Provide a copy of a valid government-issued photo identification for each borrower.
